container_smoke.command: docker run --rm ros:humble-ros-base bash -lc 'set -e; command -v ros2; ros2 --help >/tmp/ros2_help.txt; apt-get update >/tmp/apt_update.log; apt-get install -y python3-colcon-common-extensions >/tmp/apt_install.log; command -v colcon; colcon --help >/tmp/colcon_help.txt; echo OK'
